items.name_en: 【Premium Quality Factory Original】💗Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag 👝👝
items.name_cn:
【Premium Quality Factory Original】💗Goyard Jouvence Toiletry Bag 👝👝
 The Goyard Jouvence series is a classic in Goyard's art of life and travel! Handcrafted from cowhide, paired with a yellow lining, featuring an inner and outer pocket design 👛👛 Simple, lightweight, sturdy, and durable. The clean and tidy lining and elegant appearance make it an indispensable functional product for travel 💃💃
 🔆The large toiletry bag is the perfect choice for large capacity storage 🔆The small toiletry bag is for carrying essentials, accommodating quick touch-ups, and can also be used as a small wallet and clutch, representing Goyard's practicality and urban style.
Size GM size :30x23×7.5cm
🔎 020206
